title: Arzulian gains modifier from SPD over twelve

card.rawText: For each point in this card's SPD stat over 12, gain Modifier +1.

effect.value: For each point in this card's SPD stat over 12, gain Modifier +1.

plan.title: Arzulian gains modifier from SPD over twelve
plan.summary: Put Arzulian on field with Common Boots raising SPD to 15 and verify its modifier gains +3.

notes: Pre-place Common Boots on field equipped to Arzulian so its current SPD is 15.

steps: Set Arzulian as player_1 primary creature.
Equip Common Boots to raise Arzulian's SPD over 12.

expectedAssertions.label: Modifier gained three from SPD over twelve

manualVerification: Confirm the bonus dynamically recalculates if Arzulian's SPD changes.
riskNotes: Arzulian has base Modifier +2, so current SPD 15 should produce effective Modifier +5.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
